name: Peppy Cheese Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients (except nuts) in a food processor and process to mix well.
2. Cover and chill for 30 minutes.
3. Form into a log.
4. Wrap in waxed paper and chill for 2-96 hours.
5. Unwrap and roll in chopped nuts to coat evenly.
6. Serve at room temperature with assorted savory crackers on the side.
